details.test: Task 1: Earliest weekday evening adult cleaning next week at Downtown clinic
Task 2: Cost estimate for uninsured molar root canal with crown
Task 3: Saturday pediatric visit with 4+ star dentist
Task 4: Invisalign consultation for adult (nearly invisible, <24 months)
Task 5: Choose higher preventive insurance plan and request cleaning
Task 6: After-hours severe toothache emergency message with callback
Task 7: Weekday afternoon new patient exam for 10-year-old
Task 8: Whitening promotion under $200 and morning consultation this month
